description: A sales agent is on the phone with a potential customer and needs to provide a real-time shipping quote for an order.

nodes.task_description: Enter the destination address and the list of items the customer wants to order.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately inputs the required information.

nodes.task_description: Use a rating engine to get real-time shipping rates from multiple carriers (e.g., Parcel, LTL).

expected_outcome.value: The system returns quotes for Standard Ground, 2-Day Air, and Next-Day Air.

nodes.task_description: Communicate the different shipping options and their costs to the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly presents the available shipping methods and prices.
